message:
fix(search-core): switch CacheInvalidator events from Vec to VecDeque to avoid O(n) remove(0)

Mirrors the same fix applied to the db search_cache module — bounded
event history now uses VecDeque with push_back/pop_front instead of
Vec push/remove(0).

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
